ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT, CALENDAR OF APR-27-2011 THE COURT PRESENTED THE FOLLOWING TENTATIVE DECISION AND ADOPTED IT AS FOLLOWS: DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR DECLARATORY RELIEF SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. DEMURRER TO CAUSE OF ACTION FOR SLANDER OF TITLE SUSTAINED WITH LEAVE TO AMEND. BOREL'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE COMPLETE COURT FILE AND ALL PAPERS CONTAINED THEREIN WITH RESPECT TO CASE NUMBER PES-10-293160 IS GRANTED IN PARTAND DENIED IN PART. THE COURT TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE THAT THERE IS ON FILE WITH THE COURT AN ESTATE OF JAMES D. JEFFERSON, CASE NUMBER PES-10-293160 AND TAKES JUDICIAL NOTICE OF THE COURT ORDERS WITHIN THE FILE. THE COURT DECLINES TO TAKE JUDICIAL NOTICE OF OTHER PAPERS CONTAINED THEREIN. BOREL'S REQUEST FOR JUDICIAL NOTICE [IN SUPPORT OF REPLY TO DEMURRER] IS GRANTED TO THE EXTENT THE PETITION WAS FILED IN PES-10-293160; THAT LETTERS OF SPECIAL ADMINISTRATION ISSUED, AND THAT THE LIS PENDENS WAS FILED; DENIED IN OTHER RESPECTS. MOTION TO STRIKE OFF CALENDAR.

Notice Of Motion And Motion To Strike Portions Of First Amended Complaint For Declaratory Relief And Slander Of Title
Off Calendar Sep-01-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Sharan Johal and Douglas Applegate for Gateway Bank. Dan Cortwright for Borel Private Bank & Trust Company.

The Court provided preliminary remarks. Counsel presented oral argument to support their positions. Upon conclusion of argument, the Court overruled the demurrer and denied the Motion to Strike Portions of the First Amended Complaint.

Judge: Mary E. Wiss. Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR#11312. Clerk: Rosie Noguera.

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jul-29-2011 Continued To Oct-14-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Continued To Sep-01-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

Off Calendar Jul-12-2011 Continued To Sep-01-11 At 02:00 P.M. In Dept 204

CASE MANAGEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Jun-24-2011 Continued To Aug-12-11 At 09:00 A.M. In Dept 610

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Motion To Strike Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Off Calendar

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Amended Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Text Ruling

ADDED TO CALENDAR FOR Demurrer To Complaint
Off Calendar Apr-27-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Appearances: Douglas Applegate and Sharan Johal for Gateway Bank. Dan Courtright for Borel Private Bank.

The presented Counsel with a typed copy of its tentative ruling. Discussions regarding the Inventory and Appraisal, etc., were held. At the conclussions of discussions, the Court adopted its tentative ruling:

Demurrer to Cause of Action for Declaratory Relief sustained with leave to amend.

Demurrer to Cause of Action for Slander of Title sustained with leave to amend.

Borel's Request for Judicial Notice of the complete court file and all papers contained therein with respect to case number PES-10-293160 is granted in partand denied in part. The Court takes judicial notice that there is on file with the court an Estate of James D. Jefferson, case number PES-10-293160 and takes judicial notice of the Court Orders within the file. The Court declines to take judicial notice of other papers contained therein.

Borel's Request for Judicial Notice [in support of Reply to Demurrer] is granted to the extent the Petition was filed in PES-10-293160; that Letters of Special Administration issued, and that the lis pendens was filed; denied in other respects.

Motion to Strike off calendar.

Judge: Mary Wiss. Court Reporter: Diana Chen, CSR# 11312. Clerk: Jacqueline Alameda. Bailiff: Deputy A. Payne.
